## Summary

-

## Checks

- [ ] `make ci-check`
- [ ] Other:

## Workflow

- [ ] Thought through goal, constraints, affected files, and risks
- [ ] Planned the simplest correct change
- [ ] Got plan review when needed
- [ ] Wrote tests first for production-code behavior changes when feasible, or explained why not
- [ ] Implemented the change
- [ ] Validated against the Definition of Done in `CONTRIBUTING.md`

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Requested scope is complete without unrelated refactors
- [ ] Implementation is the simplest correct version that meets current needs
- [ ] Tests cover production-code behavior changes
- [ ] Quality gates pass or skipped checks are explained
- [ ] Docs are updated when behavior, commands, setup, or agent expectations change
- [ ] Security, dependency, generated-file, and workflow-permission impacts are called out
- [ ] Automation and documented commands agree

## Change Type

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tooling/CI
- [ ] Python code
- [ ] Agent configuration
- [ ] Security-sensitive

## Notes

- Test-first exception, if any:
- Complexity added and why:
- Tests or checks skipped:
- New dependencies:
- Generated files:
- Security or migration considerations:
